translation: Are you going ahead like this #Lega #MatteoSalvini, #disegnodilegge #taxation for weddings in #Church. What do you want, was it predictable, was it just? As Bruno Vespa said "let them try". But yes! The problem is the #migrants. Don't lose freedom without noticing. We, who vote, are the problem.

label: unrelated
plaintext: @paulolden1 Si ma non è  stata un invasione capite? Lo hanno scelto i paesi stessi di entrarvi, per questione di sicurezza.
translation: Are you not invaded? They chose the countries themselves to enter you, for security reasons.

label: anti-immigration
plaintext: Noi italiani ci prendono in giro tutti, continuano gli sbarchi, perché non li mandate a casa di Letta Migranti: sbarcati a Pozzallo i 440 della Sea Watch 3 , più dettagli : https://t.co/pPQqV2E226
translation: Italians are taking us for a ride, they keep coming ashore, why don't they send them back home to Letta? Migrants: 440 boarded in Pozzallo on the Sea Watch 3, more details: https://t.co/pPQqV2E226

label: pro-immigration
plaintext: #RefugeesWelcome  Grazie #Astral❤🙏 Se leggete i commenti sotto il tweet di @openarms_it , è tutto un insulto alla generosità dell'equipaggio e ai profughi.  Il nostro paese sta sprofondando sempre più.  Non vedo chi riuscirà a tirarci fuori da tutta questa merda.
translation:
#RefugeesWelcome 
Thank you #Astral❤️🙏

Reading the comments under @openarms_it's tweet is an insult to the generosity of the crew and refugees.  Our country is sinking deeper and deeper.  I don't see who will be able to pull us out of this mess.
